calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Frederic Campagnoli appearing for and with executor, Letica Supnet-Tano. Her husband Carlos is also in court. There is no residual clause in the will. The executor has not heard from her siblings. No objection to the proposed distribtion has been filed. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Continued To Apr-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
